# Requirements Intel
<!-- Auto-generated by gsd-doc-synthesizer. Do not edit by hand. -->
<!-- Provenance: README.md (PRD, high confidence) -->

All requirements below are derived from the PRD source (README.md). No competing
PRD sources were present in this ingest, so no acceptance-criteria conflicts arise.

---

## REQ-token-port
source: /Users/temp/Documents/workspace/design-system/design_handoff/README.md
description: Port all CSS custom property tokens from the reference HTML into the
  codebase token system before any components are built. Covers: color (light +
  dark), typography, spacing, radius, shadow, motion, and focus tokens.
acceptance criteria:
  - :root defines all tokens listed in the README Design Tokens section
  - body.dark block overrides all color tokens for dark mode
  - Both light and dark modes are visually verified in Storybook or equivalent
  - --focus-ring is defined and applied to all interactive elements
  - prefers-reduced-motion media query caps animations at 200ms or instant

## REQ-colorpicker
source: /Users/temp/Documents/workspace/design-system/design_handoff/README.md
  + /Users/temp/Documents/workspace/design-system/design_handoff/design-system/ds-colorpicker.jsx
description: Implement the ColorPicker component as a React+TypeScript primitive
  with a gradient saturation/brightness area, hue bar, opacity slider, hex input,
  alpha display, preset swatches, and tonal scale strips. Provide a separate
  inline color-input variant (swatch + hex field) for embedding in form fields.
acceptance criteria:
  - Gradient area: 150px tall, crosshair cursor, color preview thumb at active position
  - Hue bar: 12px tall, rainbow gradient, draggable thumb
  - Opacity bar: 12px tall, checkerboard underlay + color overlay, draggable thumb
  - Hex input: validates #RRGGBB format before updating color state
  - Alpha field: read-only display of opacity percentage
  - Preset swatches: 10 colors (see DECISION-011), selected swatch highlighted
    with 2.5px ink border
  - Tonal strips: Amber (8 stops), Blue (8 stops), Neutral (8 stops); strip cells
    clickable, 36px tall, scaleY on hover
  - Inline color-input variant: swatch (18x18px, 4px radius) + hex text input
    side by side within ds-input-wrap
  - Full keyboard navigation across all sub-parts
  - Both light and dark mode renderings tested

## REQ-confirmdialog
source: /Users/temp/Documents/workspace/design-system/design_handoff/README.md
  + /Users/temp/Documents/workspace/design-system/design_handoff/design-system/ds-confirmdialog.jsx
description: Implement ConfirmDialog and TypeToConfirm React components. ConfirmDialog
  accepts a tone prop with four variants governing icon, icon background tint, and
  confirm button style. TypeToConfirm gates a destructive action behind a typed
  confirmation word.
acceptance criteria:
  - ConfirmDialog supports tone: "danger" | "warn" | "success" | "neutral"
  - Width 360px, glass/blur surface (blur 14px), border-radius 14px, deep shadow
  - Icon area: 40x40px, rounded-10px tinted box, tone-matched icon (22px)
  - Title: Archivo 700 15px; body: 12.5px --ink-2, line-height 1.5
  - Footer: Cancel (ds-btn default) + Confirm (tone-matched class)
  - Danger tone: confirm button bg var(--red), color #fff
  - TypeToConfirm: input matches ds-input, confirm button disabled until typed
    value equals target word (default "DELETE")
  - TypeToConfirm confirm: red bg when ok=true, ink-5 at 60% opacity when false
  - onConfirm and onCancel callbacks are required props
  - Keyboard: Enter triggers confirm when button is enabled; Escape triggers cancel

## REQ-datagrid
source: /Users/temp/Documents/workspace/design-system/design_handoff/README.md
  + /Users/temp/Documents/workspace/design-system/design_handoff/design-system/ds-datagrid.jsx
description: Implement the DataGrid component: a sortable, column-resizable,
  row-selectable table with bulk-action toolbar and paginated footer.
acceptance criteria:
  - Column schema: key, label, width (px), sortable (boolean), align ("left"|"right")
  - Sorting: single-column, click header to toggle asc/desc; active sort indicated
    by amber triangle indicator (▲/▼)
  - Column resizing: 6px drag handle at column right edge, min-width 60px,
    updates column width via mousemove on document
  - Row checkbox column: 16x16px ds-checkbox, select-all in header
  - Selected row: 4% amber tint background
  - Bulk-action bar: visible when selection.size > 0; shows count, Export,
    Archive (danger), Clear buttons; 5% amber tint background
  - Status cells: ds-badge with modifier per DECISION-015 mapping
  - Priority cells: 6px colored dot + capitalized label (see DECISION-015 colors)
  - Salary column: --mono font 12px, right-aligned
  - Applied column: --mono font 11px
  - Footer: row count (--mono 10px --ink-4) + page button group (prev, pages, next)
  - Horizontal scroll wrapper around table; glass surface container
  - Fully keyboard navigable: arrow keys between cells, Space to select rows

## REQ-sparkline
source: /Users/temp/Documents/workspace/design-system/design_handoff/README.md
  + /Users/temp/Documents/workspace/design-system/design_handoff/design-system/ds-dataviz.jsx
description: Implement the Sparkline component as a pure SVG polyline chart.
acceptance criteria:
  - Props: data (number[]), width (default 100), height (default 28),
    color (default "var(--amber)"), fill (boolean, default true)
  - Y normalization: maps data range to [2, height-2] with 2px top/bottom padding
  - Stroke: 1.5px, strokeLinecap="round", strokeLinejoin="round"
  - Fill area: path from x=0/y=height through polyline to x=width/y=height,
    fill = color at 10% opacity
  - Terminal dot: filled circle r=2.5, color matches line color
  - No axes, no labels, no tooltips (mini chart only)
  - Accepts any CSS color value or token reference

## REQ-minidonut
source: /Users/temp/Documents/workspace/design-system/design_handoff/README.md
  + /Users/temp/Documents/workspace/design-system/design_handoff/design-system/ds-dataviz.jsx
description: Implement the MiniDonut component as an SVG ring chart.
acceptance criteria:
  - Props: value (number), max (default 100), size (default 48),
    strokeWidth (default 5), color (default "var(--amber)")
  - Track circle: var(--cream-2), same strokeWidth
  - Progress arc: color, strokeDashoffset computed from (1 - value/max) * circumference
  - strokeLinecap="round" on progress arc
  - SVG rotated -90deg so 0% starts at 12 o'clock
  - Transition: stroke-dashoffset 0.6s ease-out
  - Caller is responsible for placing the value label absolutely centered

## REQ-minibar
source: /Users/temp/Documents/workspace/design-system/design_handoff/README.md
  + /Users/temp/Documents/workspace/design-system/design_handoff/design-system/ds-dataviz.jsx
description: Implement the MiniBar component as a CSS-flex bar chart.
acceptance criteria:
  - Props: data (number[]), labels (string[], optional), height (default 100),
    barColor (default "var(--amber)")
  - Layout: flexbox, align-items: flex-end, gap 6px
  - Bar: maxWidth 32px, border-radius "4px 4px 0 0", height = (value/max)*70%,
    minHeight 4px, opacity 0.8, height transition 0.4s ease-out
  - Value label: --mono 9px --ink-3 700, above bar
  - Category label: --mono 8px --ink-4, below bar (only when labels prop present)

## REQ-relativetime
source: /Users/temp/Documents/workspace/design-system/design_handoff/design-system/ds-dataviz.jsx
description: Implement the RelativeTime component that formats a date as a human
  relative string with tooltip showing exact datetime.
acceptance criteria:
  - Props: date (string|Date), prefix (string, optional)
  - Format rules: < 60min → "Nm ago"; < 24h → "Nh ago"; < 30d → "Nd ago";
    >= 30d → locale date string; future dates → "in Nm"
  - title attribute on root span shows exact locale datetime for hover tooltip
  - Prefix rendered in --ink-4 with trailing space before relative string

## REQ-statcard
source: /Users/temp/Documents/workspace/design-system/design_handoff/design-system/ds-dataviz.jsx
description: Implement StatCard composition: a glass surface card combining a
  metric label, large numeric value, trend badge, and optional Sparkline.
acceptance criteria:
  - Metric label: --mono 9px --ink-3 700, uppercase, letter-spacing 0.08em
  - Value: Archivo 800 28px, letter-spacing -0.02em
  - Trend badge: "padding 3px 7px, radius 4px", --mono 10px 700; positive = green
    tint + green text, negative = red tint + red text
  - Sparkline occupies full card width below value; color matches trend sentiment
  - Glass surface: className="glass", padding 16px, border-radius 12px

## REQ-alertbanner
source: /Users/temp/Documents/workspace/design-system/design_handoff/design-system/ds-dataviz.jsx
description: Implement AlertBanner component with four tone variants: info,
  success, warning, error.
acceptance criteria:
  - Variants: info (blue), success (green), warning (amber-d), error (red)
  - Structure: tinted background + border, 24x24px icon badge (radius 6px) on left,
    message text (flex 1, color = tone color, fontWeight 500, fontSize 13px),
    dismiss X icon on right (14px, 60% opacity)
  - Padding 10x14px, border-radius 10px
  - Dismiss icon triggers onDismiss callback
  - Color tokens: info → --blue, success → --green, warning → --amber-d, error → --red
  - Border colors: semi-transparent version of tone color (20% opacity)

## REQ-commandpalette
source: /Users/temp/Documents/workspace/design-system/design_handoff/design-system/ds-advanced.jsx
description: Implement CommandPalette component: a modal search interface activated
  by Cmd/Ctrl+K with grouped results and fuzzy filtering.
acceptance criteria:
  - Trigger: Cmd+K / Ctrl+K keyboard shortcut; also openable via button
  - Overlay: ds-overlay class, click-away closes, paddingTop 15vh (opens near top)
  - Container: ds-cmd class, input row + scrollable result body
  - Input: ds-cmd-input, autofocus on open, live-filters results
  - Group headers: ds-cmd-group class
  - Items: ds-cmd-item class; icon (14px) + label (flex 1) + optional shortcut kbd
  - Shortcut displayed as ds-kbd span
  - ESC key and ESC label button both close and clear query
  - No-results message: centered 13px --ink-4 text
  - Item click closes palette and clears query

## REQ-pagination
source: /Users/temp/Documents/workspace/design-system/design_handoff/design-system/ds-advanced.jsx
description: Implement Pagination component in two variants: full and compact.
acceptance criteria:
  - Full: prev ds-icbtn (disabled on page 1) + page number buttons (ds-page-btn)
    + ellipsis (non-interactive) + next ds-icbtn (disabled on last page) +
    "Page N of M" label (--mono 10px --ink-4)
  - Active page: ds-page-btn with "active" class
  - Compact: prev ds-icbtn + "N / M" text (--mono 11px 600) + next ds-icbtn
  - onPageChange(page: number) callback prop
  - totalPages and currentPage as required props
  - Keyboard: arrow key navigation between page buttons, Enter to select

## REQ-kbd
source: /Users/temp/Documents/workspace/design-system/design_handoff/design-system/ds-advanced.jsx
  + /Users/temp/Documents/workspace/design-system/design_handoff/design-system/ds-confirmdialog.jsx
description: Implement Kbd component wrapping the ds-kbd CSS class for keyboard
  shortcut display. Appears in CommandPalette shortcuts, ConfirmDialog type-prompt,
  and inline documentation.
acceptance criteria:
  - Renders a <kbd> element with ds-kbd class
  - Accepts children as shortcut string (e.g. "⌘K", "ESC", "DELETE")
  - Inherits font and styling from ds-kbd CSS class (defined in global styles)
  - Usable standalone or inline with text

## REQ-system-components-inventory
source: /Users/temp/Documents/workspace/design-system/design_handoff/README.md
description: The full set of 53 sections across 10 groups must be implementable
  using the design system component library. The library must include components
  for every visual pattern defined in the handoff.
acceptance criteria:
  - All 53 sections from the README sections list have corresponding component(s)
  - Components not yet implemented (see SYNTHESIS.md missing list) are built
    before "Sample Screens" integration test
  - Sample Screens integration test passes with correct visual output in both
    light and dark mode
